prose:
The frontier-orbitals task was run on formaldehyde using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation converged successfully.

The following frontier orbital energies were calculated:
HOMO: -7.6523 eV
LUMO: -1.7826 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap: 5.8697 eV
